title: Building the App Store for Agentic Engineering
summary: Cole Medin is building a workflow marketplace for Archon, a platform that enables agentic engineering through YAML-defined workflows that run in isolated git worktrees. The marketplace will allow users to share and reuse battle-tested AI coding workflows, addressing the current redundancy of teams rebuilding the same workflows privately.
